title: Vaccination and Public Health
text: Vaccines can reduce disease transmission by increasing immunity in a population.

title: Ocean Warming
text: Climate change contributes to sea level rise through melting ice and thermal expansion.

title: Cardiovascular Fitness
text: Regular exercise improves heart function and supports cardiovascular health.

title: Nutrition Basics
text: Balanced nutrition provides energy and supports immune function.

title: Coastal Flooding
text: Rising sea levels increase the risk of coastal flooding in low-lying areas.

title: Vaccine Storage
text: Some vaccines require cold-chain storage to remain effective before distribution.
